action: Login at #/login with admin phone+password → #/admin → 新增工地項目 → name 「油塘灣住宅發展項目 — DC2026」, default zone A座 + 加分區 B座 → 建立項目.
expected: createProject inserts projects row (assigned_pm_ids=[], created_by=admin). Card shows '2 個分區 · 0 位 PM'. Empty-name → '請輸入項目名稱'; dup zone id → '分區編號不可重複'.
verifyAs: pm — log in as 60001001 李PM: project is NOT yet on 我的工地 and #/dashboard has no card (no powers until assigned).

action: On the project card 指派 PM → AssignPMModal (admin_list_user_profiles RPC, filtered global_role=pm) → tick 李PM → 儲存.
expected: assignPMs writes assigned_pm_ids=[李PM]. Card shows '1 位 PM'.
verifyAs: pm — 李PM reloads #/home: project now appears under 我的工地; #/dashboard shows the project card; sidebar 儀表板 link present.

action: (Pre-stage roles the UI can't set) Confirm 王老總=general_foreman and create/seed a safety_officer global-role account + an owner + a worker. Because EditRoleModal omits safety_officer/general_foreman (BW-06), set those via DB/RPC, NOT the UI. 簽核流程設定 → for DC2026 add a PTW chain with a safety_officer step (PTW has NO seeded default chain).
expected: safety_officer + general_foreman + owner + worker accounts exist with correct global_role. PTW chain saved (approval_chain_steps). BW-06 is logged: admin could NOT do the safety_officer/general_foreman role set via UI.
verifyAs: admin — #/admin/users role chips show counts incl 安全主任≥1, 老總≥1, 業主≥1, 判頭工人≥1.

action: Open DC2026 → 進度 tab → in A座 ZoneSection tap 加入大項 → CreateItemModal code+title (e.g. 結構工程) → save. Expand it → 加細項 中項 then 細項 (set tracking_mode percentage on a leaf).
expected: canManageStructure true (assigned PM). New 大項/中項/細項 persist and survive 刷新; parent % auto-rolls-up from leaves.
verifyAs: general_foreman (王老總, if approved member) — sees the SAME full tree (v14 GF supervisor branch); confirms structure propagated.

actor: subcontractor 何判頭 / subcontractor_worker / main_contractor / owner / general_foreman
action: Each logs in → #/projects → 申請加入工地 → DC2026 → pick their role → 提交.
expected: project_members rows status=pending appear; 我的工地 shows 待審核.
verifyAs: pm — #/projects 待審核申請 lists ALL these applicants (BUT verify each card shows the applicant name/phone, watch BW-10 載入中… for any brand-new applicant).

action: #/projects 待審核申請 → 批准 each applicant (何判頭, worker, 陳工程師/main_contractor, 王老總/GF, owner). Then BUG PROBE: log in as a user who is a project PM BY MEMBERSHIP but global_role=main_contractor and try 加入大項.
expected: Memberships flip to approved. BW-01 probe: per the current code that membership-PM CANNOT add 大項 (v15 rejects); per the INTENDED rule they SHOULD. Record which behavior occurs.
verifyAs: subcontractor 何判頭 — reloads #/home: DC2026 now openable (no longer 待審核); progress tab renders (empty until assigned).

action: On a leaf → AssignmentModal: 負責人 tab tick 陳工程師 (main_contractor); 委派判頭 tab tick 何判頭 → 儲存. THEN attempt to assign the worker.
expected: assigned_to/delegated_to written. BW-09 probe: there is NO worker option in AssignmentModal → the worker CANNOT be assigned via UI. Log P0. (Seed worker into delegated_to via DB to continue the worker path.)
verifyAs: main_contractor 陳工程師 & subcontractor 何判頭 — each opens the leaf: orange 更新 button now visible on THAT row only; sibling rows have no 更新.

action: Open the delegated leaf → 更新 → set 60% + 備註 → 儲存. Confirm sees ONLY assigned subtree + ancestors (not other trades).
expected: actual_progress=60, progress_history row written, status auto-derives. get_visible_progress_items returns only assigned+ancestor chain (v14 contributor branch).
verifyAs: pm — refreshes 進度: leaf shows 60%, parent rollup moved up; 歷史 modal shows 何判頭's entry with timestamp.

action: (After DB assignment from step7) Login → open DC2026 → find assigned leaf → 更新 75% → 儲存. Then 問題 tab → 報告新問題.
expected: Worker sees ONLY the one leaf + ancestors. Update writes history. Issue created reporter_role=subcontractor_worker, current_handler_role=subcontractor (getInitialHandler). Issue shows 處理層：判頭.
verifyAs: subcontractor 何判頭 — issue appears in 何判頭's queue with 處理層：判頭 and action buttons 標記為已解決 / 上呈.

action: Open the worker's issue → comment → 上呈到 總承建商 (escalate).
expected: current_handler_role → main_contractor (getNextHandler). canActOnIssue true while handler=判頭.
verifyAs: main_contractor 陳工程師 — issue now shows 處理層：總承建商 with 標記為已解決 / 上呈到 PM buttons; worker (reporter) can still comment, not resolve.

action: On the escalated issue tap 上呈到 PM.
expected: current_handler_role → pm (terminal; getNextHandler('pm')=null).
verifyAs: pm 李PM — issue shows 處理層：PM; PM sees 標記為已解決 (escalate disabled/terminal); worker still cannot act.

action: #/project/:id/si → 新增 → SI title+desc, attach ≥1 drawing reference + photo → save draft → submit (submit_si snapshots chain main_contractor→pm).
expected: SI status 審批中, sitting at step0 required_role=main_contractor. RLS 'Submitter creates SI' passes (membership role main_contractor). BW-02 probe in parallel: log in as worker, confirm SI 新增 button SHOWS but submit is RLS-denied.
verifyAs: pm 李PM — SI is visible in list as 審批中 at the main_contractor step; PM sees NO approve bar yet (not their step).

action: Open the SI → SiApproverBar 批准 (advance step0→pm). BW-05 probe: confirm the canAct gate (global_role) matched the RPC active_role_holders (membership) for this user.
expected: submit_approval advances to PM step; approvals audit row appended. If user's global_role=main_contractor but membership≠main_contractor → button shows but RPC errors 你冇權批准呢個步驟 (record BW-05).
verifyAs: pm 李PM — opens SI: now SiApproverBar shows 批准/批准並修改/退回/拒絕 (their step).

action: Open SI → 批准 (final step). SI locks.
expected: SI status → 已鎖定; 簽核紀錄 shows full immutable audit; 抗議 tab now available; si_lock_guard rejects new versions.
verifyAs: subcontractor 何判頭 — opens locked SI: read-only, can add 抗議 comment (RLS allows protest only when locked); 提出變更指令 button now available.

action: On the locked SI → 提出變更指令 → VO with HKD line items (人工/物料) → submit (chain main_contractor→pm→owner). BW-03 probe: as general_foreman confirm VO 新增 shows but insert RLS-denied.
expected: VO created; total_amount_cents server-recomputed (recompute_vo_totals) — client cannot tamper. VO at step0 main_contractor.
verifyAs: pm 李PM — VO visible 審批中; verify server total matches line items.

action: 陳工程師 批准 VO (→pm). 李PM 批准 (→owner). owner logs in → #/project/:id/vo/:id → VoApproverBar 批准 (final).
expected: Each step advances via submit_approval (active_role_holders incl owner membership at owner step). After owner 批准 → VO 已批准 → 已鎖定; PDF export button appears.
verifyAs: admin — InFlightApprovalsModal for the relevant users no longer lists this VO (chain complete); 簽核紀錄 shows owner's 批准 entry.

action: (PTW flag ON from step3) #/project/:id/ptw → 新增 → 動火 type + checklist + PPE photo + workers → submit (submit_ptw uses the admin-configured chain).
expected: PTW submitted, routes to the safety_officer step. If no PTW chain configured → 尚未配置工作許可證審批鏈 (would be a finding; step3 configured it).
verifyAs: safety_officer — sees the PTW at their sign-off step with a 簽核 (signature) action.

action: Open PTW → PtwApproverBar 簽核 → draw signature → submit (approve + record_ptw_signoff).
expected: Chain completes → activate_ptw sets active + expiry 23:59 HKT + QR generated. Server validates active_role_holders(project,'safety_officer') = MEMBERSHIP role safety_officer.
verifyAs: admin — CRITICAL NEGATIVE CHECK: open InFlightApprovalsModal / 重新分派 → confirm NO PTW rows appear (admin_override must NOT be able to discharge a safety_officer PTW step; modal loads SI+VO only). main_contractor — scans/open #/verify/:token → permit_scans audit row written.

action: #/project/:id/daily → 填寫今日日誌 → fill the day's work → save. BW-08 probe: log in as general_foreman and confirm read-only amber banner + no author CTA.
expected: daily row written (dailies_insert allows global_role main_contractor + sub_role foreman/engineer self only). GF/判頭/worker see amber 唔可以寫每日日誌 banner.
verifyAs: general_foreman & subcontractor — open 每日日誌: can READ the foreman's entry; no edit affordance.

action: #/project/:id/materials → 加物料 (FAB) → name/unit/qty + tick urgent + planned arrival → save. Then edit own row; attempt to edit a PEER's row.
expected: Own row create/edit OK (materials_insert global_role incl subcontractor; v16 update = requested_by self OR supervisor). Editing a peer's row → RLS-denied (judŋ is not a material supervisor).
verifyAs: general_foreman — opens 物料 as material supervisor (is_material_supervisor v16 incl general_foreman): can edit/receive 何判頭's urgent request; 行事曆 shows the order by planned_arrival_at.

action: 進度 tab → Download → 匯出進度報告 → pick 業主版（一頁紙）→ PDF; also export internal report; 問題 tab → 匯出 Excel.
expected: Owner one-pager = single overview page, per-zone % bars, NO 未開始, no leaf appendix (export.ts audience 'owner'). Internal report includes detail. Issues .xlsx downloads.
verifyAs: owner — opens 進度 read-only AND independently runs the 業主版一頁紙 export: sees the same glance-level rollup, cannot edit any item (no 加入大項 / 更新).

action: Login → DC2026 → review 進度 (read-only), 簽核 (SI/VO read + the VO they approved), 問題 (報告新問題 routes to PM; comment only, no resolve), 工具 read-only. Confirm #/admin and #/dashboard give no data.
expected: All reads gated by approved membership; owner sees no structural/approval buttons except the VO owner-step they already used. #/admin bounces to /home; #/dashboard renders empty (visibleProjects=[]).
verifyAs: pm 李PM — any new issue the owner reported shows 處理層：PM in the PM's queue, closing the full from-zero loop.
